generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are actually benefiting more from our security commitments than we are? While we're spending billions to protect them, they're cutting corners on their own defense budgets. It's time we focus on securing our own borders and ensuring our own preparedness. #AmericaFirst #NationalSecurity
